since_last: 64% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.05%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 64% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.22% · BTC +2.07% · Gold +0.17% · Nasdaq100 -1.54%. 64% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.05%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.05%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -1.00%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AVAV is the standout at +4.69%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +4.69%, PLTR +3.62%, ADBE +2.66%, ADBE +2.66%, PWR +1.63%. Laggards: BIDU -4.36%, DELL -2.35%, MU -2.33%, MRVL -1.79%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.61% at $158.5
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.61% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
